clearSession.title: Clear current session
clearSession.description: This action will clear the current conversation and also remove any attachments associated with this chat. It cannot be undone.
clearSession.error: Unable to clear the chat right now.

emptyState.title: Start a conversation
emptyState.description: Type your first message or turn on image mode from the + button.

attachmentsModal.title: Files in context
attachmentsModal.description: Files stay saved until you delete them. You can remove them from the context without deleting them from the session.
attachmentsModal.emptyDescription: Add attachments so the model can use them in your next messages.

errors.attachmentSessionLimit: Limit reached: maximum {max} attachments per session.
errors.attachmentUploadLimit: Only {max} files are allowed per upload.
errors.attachmentRemainingSlots: Only {remaining} attachment slots remain in the current session.
errors.uploadToContextFailed: Unable to upload files to the context.
errors.removeRetry: Unable to remove the attachment. Please try again.
errors.contextUpdateRetry: Unable to update the attachment context. Please try again.
errors.dropRejected: File rejected: format or size not allowed.
errors.copyFailed: Unable to copy the message right now.
errors.recordingUnsupported: Audio recording is not supported in this browser.

auth.title: Sign in to other-GPT
auth.subtitle: Use your portfolio account to continue.
auth.createAccountSubtitle: This email is new here. Set a password to register.
auth.welcomeBackSubtitle: Enter your password to sign in.
auth.metaPasswordDescription: Enter your password to sign in to other-GPT.
auth.metaRegisterDescription: Register a new account to use other-GPT.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.membershipBlocked: Your access to this app is not active. Contact an admin.
errors.emailExists: That email already has an account. Sign in instead.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unreachable: Could not reach the server. Try again shortly.
